notes: 'insyaallah' = 'God willing', softens future commitments. Verbatim preservation chosen because literal 'God willing' in English shifts register too far toward religious-formal; the Indonesian-Muslim social-context signal is that the speaker is being polite/non-committal rather than literally invoking deity. Multi-word variant 'insya Allah' (two words) and English transliteration 'inshallah' deferred — v1 chose Indonesian single-word for regex simplicity. VERIFY WITH GIRLFRIEND: which spelling is most common in your messages (insyaallah / insya Allah / inshallah).
